name: USB Servo Programmer (SP-USBP)
description: Set power, torque, hunting suppression, neutral width and reverse on Yokomo SP-02D / SP-03D drift servos via the SP-USBP adapter.
notes: Portable exe - unzip and run, no installer. Covers SP-02DV2 (and A/BL/P/R variants), SP-03DV2A/BL/PA/RA and the MDR-020 series; the SP-02D is Yokomo's RWD-drift-dedicated servo. Yokomo publishes no separate PDF - the product page carries the read/adjust/write instructions. The version is embedded in both the URL and the exe name, so bump them together; version_check scrapes the product page for the zip filename, which catches a download-URL change and a version bump in one go. Note https://teamyokomo.com/users/servo/ itself redirects to the site root - only the exact file path works.
